message:
feat: Expand E2E test coverage and fix TUI components

- Enhance E2E hook tests (543 lines added)
- Improve E2E worker tests (322 additions)
- Add E2E pipeline tests (214 additions)
- Fix TUI components: app, event, state, widgets
- Update binary hash and verification modules
- Improve remote compilation and verification
- Fix test change and daemon lifecycle tests

Closes: remote_compilation_helper-y9z, remote_compilation_helper-7dr, remote_compilation_helper-8qc.3
